name: Confluence Update Page
description: Update a page, auto-bumping version (PUT /rest/api/content/{id}). Blank title keeps current.
script:
import requests
try:
    import urllib3
    urllib3.disable_warnings()
except Exception:
    pass

TIMEOUT = 30

class NodeError(Exception):
    pass

def _client():
    base = str(base_url or "").strip().rstrip("/")
    em = str(email or "").strip()
    token = str(api_token or "").strip()
    if not base:
        raise NodeError("base_url is required (e.g. https://your-org.atlassian.net/wiki)")
    if not em or not token:
        raise NodeError("email and api_token are required")
    sess = requests.Session()
    sess.verify = False
    sess.headers.update({
        "Authorization": "Bearer " + token,
        "Accept": "application/json",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
    })
    return sess, base

def _check(resp):
    if not resp.ok:
        detail = ""
        try:
            j = resp.json()
            detail = j.get("message") or str(j)
        except Exception:
            detail = (resp.text or "")[:300]
        raise NodeError("Confluence API %s: %s" % (resp.status_code, detail))
    return resp

def _page_out(base, page):
    links = page.get("_links", {}) or {}
    webui = links.get("webui", "")
    site = links.get("base") or base.split("/wiki")[0]
    body_v = (((page.get("body") or {}).get("storage") or {}).get("value"))
    return {
        "id": page.get("id"),
        "title": page.get("title"),
        "body": body_v,
        "version": ((page.get("version") or {}).get("number")),
        "status": page.get("status"),
        "url": (site + webui) if webui else "",
    }

s, base = _client()
pid = str(page_id).strip()
if not pid:
    raise NodeError("page_id is required")
cur = _check(s.get(base + "/rest/api/content/" + pid, params={"expand": "version"}, timeout=TIMEOUT)).json()
next_ver = int((cur.get("version") or {}).get("number", 0)) + 1
ttl = str(title).strip() or cur.get("title")
minor = str(minor_edit).strip().lower() in ("true", "1", "yes")
payload = {
    "id": pid,
    "type": "page",
    "title": ttl,
    "version": {"number": next_ver, "minorEdit": minor},
    "body": {"storage": {"value": str(body or ""), "representation": "storage"}},
}
r = _check(s.put(base + "/rest/api/content/" + pid, json=payload, timeout=TIMEOUT))
out = _page_out(base, r.json())
id = out["id"]
title = out["title"]
version = out["version"]
url = out["url"]
